MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant's Counsel Scott E. Hennigh for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4 (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved. The case was removed from the Early Settlement Program. Proceedings not reported. (212)
